nodes.label: AI use for quick, bounded tasks
nodes.label_negative: Manual performance of low-value mandated tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I have ChatGPT or Gemini identify the objectives and can-do statements for my lesson plans because it's a task that I don't see a lot of value in and is tedious

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: Full reliance on AI reducing personal creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I do get a little worried that I'm being 'lazy' and lowering my creativity by outsourcing these tasks

nodes.label: AI-generated student work
nodes.label_negative: AI as complete solution without teacher input
nodes.grounding_span: I get seeds of ideas and modify from there

nodes.label: Company policy restricting AI tool use
nodes.grounding_span: I don't use it for anything that the admin would see directly

nodes.label: AI as workload reducer for repetitive tasks
nodes.grounding_span: It helped me break it all down and outline it for me to make a PPT off of it. That was so helpful, and probably the biggest relief I got from using AI so far

nodes.label: AI as tool for lesson planning
nodes.label_negative: AI as potential replacement for teacher
nodes.grounding_span: I think AI can definitely help students practice and quiz themselves... but it doesn't recreate the work I do as a teacher

nodes.label: AI use in education
nodes.label_negative: AI as inherently good or bad
nodes.grounding_span: I think it's a tool that can be used for good and bad, so the education for admin, teaching staff, and students needs to be how to use it for good

nodes.label: AI as tool to address academic dishonesty
nodes.grounding_span: I think it is just becoming more rampant with easy, universal access to AI

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: saves me the tedious thinking aspect of doing it

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I do get a little worried that I'm being 'lazy' and lowering my creativity

nodes.label: Student-centered education
nodes.grounding_span: I know all of the context of the class - individual student interests, strengths, difficulties

nodes.label: Professional integrity and avoiding gossip
nodes.grounding_span: I don't really talk about using it because I don't want other teachers to gossip

nodes.label: Stress reduction and task management
nodes.grounding_span: probably the biggest relief I got from using AI so far

nodes.label: Teacher irreplaceability and holistic education
nodes.grounding_span: There is so much more to teaching than just instruction

nodes.label: Academic integrity
nodes.grounding_span: education for admin, teaching staff, and students needs to be how to use it for good

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: saves me the tedious thinking aspect of doing it

nodes.label: Concern about creativity loss
nodes.grounding_span: I do get a little worried that I'm being 'lazy' and lowering my creativity

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI as research catalyst
nodes.grounding_span: I get seeds of ideas and modify from there

nodes.label: Strategic concealment of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I don't use it for anything that the admin would see directly

nodes.label: Relief from overwhelming workload
nodes.grounding_span: probably the biggest relief I got from using AI so far

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI replacing teachers
nodes.grounding_span: I really don't see how it's possible with the models right now

nodes.label: Advocacy for responsible AI use with caution
nodes.grounding_span: It's not that important to me to promote it or oppose it

nodes.label: Frustration with AI dishonesty
nodes.grounding_span: many times, districts/admin don't have teachers backs and say we can't prove it

nodes.label: Contextual adaptation — tailors AI suggestions to specific classroom realities
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely modify and build off of them because I know all of the context of the class

nodes.label: Domain-based compartmentalization of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I don't use it for anything that the admin would see directly
